reviews.comment:
Deben corregir el horario de atencion !!!! anoche 22 hs consulte por este medio y decia "abiero las 24 hs " llegué casi sin combustible para descubrir que estaba cerrado
Por favorrrr actualicen la información.....no sean dinosaurios

(Translated by Google)
You need to correct your opening hours! Last night at 10 PM I checked through this channel and it said "open 24 hours." I arrived almost out of gas only to find you were closed. Please update the information... don't be dinosaurs!
